ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-07-2016 Continued To Apr-04-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Jennifer Thaete appearing by Court Call for Neil Ball (Petitioner).

The Court informed Ms. Thaete that a response to the examiners notes from January 25, 2016 is required. Ms. Taete stated that 13100 petitions have been prepared for the children and she is awaiting signatures. The Court continues the accounting petition re: accounting #16 to April 4, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Nancy Wong. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Nov-23-2015 Continued To Dec-14-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator Neil S. Ball and the Attorney Jennifer Thaete to appear on December 14, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to address 12201(b) regarding notice. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Oct-06-2015 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Aug-22-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jennifer Thaete appeared by telephone for Neil Ball (Petitioner).

The Court asked what needs to be done in this Estate. Ms. Thaete stated her Client believes that there are unclaimed escheated funds to the State and that there are fees that were owed to Jeanette Ball by an Attorney. The Court advised Counsel that her Client needs to sign and verify all pleadings. The Court granted the Petition for Appointment of Successor Administrator with independent powers, full authority and no bond (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Loos. (Not Reported)
